speaker: Rex
content: Look, all I'm saying is that this whole it takes two to mess up a marriage theory is bull, the problems that we have are because of her.
mark: all I'm saying is that... 我所说的全部就是……；我只是想说……
it takes two to... 表示…是双方的事；双方都有责任
mess up 弄糟；破坏；搞砸 mess n. 肮脏，杂乱 v. 弄脏，弄乱；
bull n. 公牛；废话，胡说八道；靶心
this whole it takes two to mess up a marriage theory is bull == this whole theory that it takes two to mess up a marriage is bull.

speaker: Rex
content: All right, fine. What I have been doing for the past 20 years has been so awful?
mark: What I have been doing ... 是what引导的主语从句
have been doing 现在完成进行时 What have you been doing these days? 你这些天一直在做什么？I’ve been working.
for the past 20 years 在过去的 20 年里

speaker: Rex
content: You're not saying anything because I've been a great husband, and it kills you to admit that.
mark: It kills sb to admit sth 让某人承认某事真的很难受（或很痛苦、很煎熬）

speaker: Dr. Goldfine
content: Rex, I'm curious, do you ever acknowledge the benefits of living with Bree?
mark: curious adj. 好奇的，求知欲强的；稀奇的，不寻常的；爱挑剔的
acknowledge v. 承认；认可； 跟……打招呼，理会；告知收到；（公开）感谢
the benefits of sth 某事 / 某物的益处、好处

speaker: Dr. Goldfine
content: By your own admission, your home's always clean, your clothes are always freshly pressed, she sounds like a wonderful cook.
mark: By your own admission 据你自己所说 admission n. 承认，供认
freshly adv. 新近；精神饱满地 pressed adj. （时间、资金等）紧缺的；压平的，压扁的 freshly pressed  刚压榨的；刚熨烫的

speaker: Dr. Goldfine
content: Despite her flaws, do you ever remember to say thank you?
mark: despite prep. 尽管，即使；不由自主地，忍不住地
flaw n. 缺点，缺陷；裂痕，瑕疵 v. 削弱，使失效
